title: AAR — Self-host front-end assets (fix slow "blank-then-loads" page loads)
scope: Loading the live site (superinnings.com / superinnin.gs) felt slow: every page showed a blank/unstyled flash for a while before appearing.

rationale.item: The cause was front-end, not the server. Every page extends base.html, whose <head> render-blocked on three external domains before the browser could paint: fonts.googleapis.com, fonts.gstatic.com, cdn.jsdelivr.net
A stylesheet <link> blocks first paint until it loads. When those CDNs are slow/throttled from the visitor's network, the page sits blank even though the Flask server responded instantly.
The fonts are used throughout the CSS (headlines, scores, team abbrevs, stat tables all key off Oswald), so simply dropping them would have changed the look — the owner chose to keep it.

delegation_events.decision: Keep the fonts rather than dropping them
delegation_events.quote: simply dropping them would have changed the look — the owner chose to keep it.

actions.description: Vendored the exact same assets into o27v2/web/static/vendor/ and pointed base.html at them via url_for('static', ...), so first paint is same-origin with zero external round-trips. No version changes, no build step.
Bootstrap 5.3.0 CSS/JS vendored byte-for-byte from jsDelivr
Google Fonts CSS rewritten so src: url(...) points at local files; kept latin + latin-ext subsets (covers accented player/country names); dropped vietnamese/cyrillic; font-display: swap preserved
4 woff2 files, 117 KB total; Archivo and Oswald are variable fonts, so one woff2 per family/subset serves every weight
Removed the now-unneeded preconnect hints to the Google Fonts domains

risk_posture: No version changes, no build step (consistent with the project's "single package, no build step" stance).
the change is template + static assets only, with no Python/route changes

validation_claims.check_method: Render base.html via Jinja2 in a Python shell

validation_claims.claim: woff2 files verified (wOF2 magic bytes); fonts.css rewritten to 4 unique local src URLs across 20 @font-face rules.
validation_claims.check_method: Check magic bytes of static/vendor/fonts/*.woff2 and grep fonts.css @font-face rules

validation_claims.claim: Could not run the live server here (no Flask/DB in the sandbox)
validation_claims.check_method: Run o27v2/manage.py runserver and load a page

non_actions.item: universe_new.html still loads cdn.tailwindcss.com (the dev-only JIT CDN)
non_actions.reason: It's a single page, not part of the every-page base.html path, and vendoring Tailwind properly needs a build step the project avoids — left as a separate decision.

non_actions.item: Left Flask's default static caching (ETag/conditional 304s) as-is
non_actions.reason: The first-paint win is from removing the external hops; long-lived Cache-Control on these immutable vendor files is a possible future tweak for repeat visits.

open_hooks: long-lived Cache-Control on these immutable vendor files is a possible future tweak for repeat visits
Vendoring Tailwind for universe_new.html left as a separate decision
section_headers_original: AAR — Self-host front-end assets (fix slow "blank-then-loads" page loads)
parser_notes: No date anywhere in the document (no Date:/Prepared: line, none in headings or body); record_id uses 'undated'. Short but complete AAR shape.
